title: Sparks — inline reflection capture while reading
description: As a reader I want to capture a spark (reflection or idea) inline while reading so I can record thoughts in the moment without leaving my reading view. Includes free-text entry, timestamp, and optional page number.

title: Sparks — tag and categorize reflections
description: As a reader I want to apply tags to my sparks (e.g. 'theme', 'question', 'quote') so I can filter and review them by type later.

title: Kindle highlight import via CSV
description: As a reader I want to upload a Kindle highlights CSV export so my existing highlights are automatically imported and linked to the correct book in Bookworm.

title: Kindle import — map highlights to Sparks
description: As a reader I want imported Kindle highlights to appear as Sparks so they live in the same reflection layer as my manual entries.

title: Book search powered by Open Library API
description: As a reader I want to search for a book by title or author and select it from results so I don't have to manually enter book metadata.

title: Reading status — add Paused state
description: As a reader I want to mark a book as Paused so I can distinguish books I've temporarily set aside from ones I'm actively reading or have abandoned.

title: Fix: duplicate books appearing after sync
description: Books synced across devices occasionally created duplicate entries in the library view. Root cause was missing idempotency check on sync write. Fixed.

title: Migrate auth to Supabase v2
description: Upgraded Supabase auth client from v1 to v2 to align with current SDK. No user-facing changes. Required updates to session handling and token refresh logic.
